name: Easton 24x36 Garage Shed Plan - A Modern Three-Bay Garage with Sleek Sloped Roof
open_features: A streamlined architectural profile ideal for modern homes, tight property lines, efficient drainage, and snowy climates.
Straightforward framing, clean lines, and simple geometry make this design accessible for both beginners and professional builders.
Three generously sized garage doors provide smooth vehicle entry and excellent storage flexibility for trucks, cars, ATVs, equipment, and workshop materials.
Warm horizontal wood siding, crisp white trim, high clerestory windows, and a sleek single-pitch roof create a modern-rustic balance with incredible curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Easton Garage Shed Plan - a 24x36 modern garage and workshop solution crafted for efficiency, bold architectural style, and year-round practicality. With its clean single-slope roof, warm horizontal wood siding, and three spacious garage bays, the Easton delivers contemporary design matched with everyday utility. Whether you're building a vehicle storage hub, a full-scale workshop, a hobby studio, or a multifunctional backyard structure, the Easto...
